title: Retro Items
body:
_(Fabric Loader and Cloth Config are required.)_  

This is an implementation of the flat item look from early versions of minecraft! It overrides the item rendering code, and comes with plenty of visual and gameplay options. 

![Items with Shadows Enabled](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/351/968/2021-03-29_19.png)  

An option also exists to generate all item models as flat, which is a good way to improve performance and the flat aesthetic.
![Mobs](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/351/965/2021-03-25_23.png)
